mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hearing_tokens (student_id, token, expires_at, used_at) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{token}, #{expiresAt}, #{usedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, student_id AS studentId, token, expires_at AS expiresAt, used_at AS usedAt, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM hearing_tokens WHERE token = #{token}

SELECT id, student_id AS studentId, token, expires_at AS expiresAt, used_at AS usedAt, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM hearing_tokens WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND used_at IS NULL AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
